title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Turret-B, AI Turret IP camera, 8MP, black
description: The UniFi Protect family camera features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, a fixed approximately 2.8mm lens (not specified by the manufacturer, inferred from the field of view) , IR illumination and white light for night vision, an audio microphone, and a speaker for two-way communication with a mute option. The camera is housed in a durable aluminum and polycarbonate casing with vandal resistance rated at IK08 and IP66 protection against dust and water jets. Network connectivity is… 8MP, 30 FPS video (3840 x 2160px) Night mode with IR LEDs or white light, IR cut filter Weather-resistant IP66 rating Vandal resistance - IK08 Built-in microphone and speaker with software mute Advanced AI features: License plate and face recognition PoE-powered (42.5 to 57V DC) Managed through UniFi Protect software Device Mounting accessories
